## Verification

Commands run:

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test -- --runInBand`
- [ ] `npm run build`

Additional checks (if applicable):

- [ ] `npm run audit:prod`
- [ ] `npm run check:any`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Screenshots / Evidence

If UI changed, attach before/after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated (README/docs) if needed
- [ ] Behavior changes are covered by tests
- [ ] Migration/ops impact documented (if any)
